examples.title: E-Waste Collection Algorithm
examples.description: Algorithm to optimize collection routes for e-waste pickup
examples.code:
ALGORITHM E-Waste Collection Optimization
BEGIN
 INPUT: collection_points[], waste_quantity[], vehicle_capacity
 SORT collection_points by proximity (nearest first)
 SET current_route = empty list
 SET current_load = 0
 
 FOR each point IN collection_points DO
 IF current_load + waste_quantity[point] <= vehicle_capacity THEN
 ADD point TO current_route
 current_load = current_load + waste_quantity[point]
 ELSE
 ADD current_route TO all_routes
 current_route = [point]
 current_load = waste_quantity[point]
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 ADD remaining route TO all_routes
 OUTPUT: all_routes
END
examples.explanation: This algorithm helps optimize e-waste collection by creating efficient routes, reducing fuel consumption and operational costs.

examples.title: Material Separation Logic
examples.description: Pseudocode for magnetic and non-magnetic material separation
examples.code:
ALGORITHM Material Separation
BEGIN
 INPUT: shredded_waste
 SET ferrous_materials = []
 SET non_ferrous_materials = []
 SET plastic_materials = []
 
 FOR each particle IN shredded_waste DO
 IF particle.contains_iron() THEN
 ADD particle TO ferrous_materials
 ELSE IF particle.is_magnetic() THEN
 ADD particle TO ferrous_materials
 ELSE IF particle.conducts_electricity() THEN
 ADD particle TO non_ferrous_materials
 ELSE
 ADD particle TO plastic_materials
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 OUTPUT: ferrous_materials, non_ferrous_materials, plastic_materials
END
examples.explanation: Separates shredded e-waste into ferrous metals (iron/steel), non-ferrous metals (copper, aluminum), and plastics for recycling.

examples.title: EPR Target Calculation
examples.description: Calculate producer's collection and recycling targets
examples.code:
ALGORITHM CalculateEPRTargets
BEGIN
 INPUT: sales_data[], year, target_percentage
 
 total_sales = SUM(sales_data)
 previous_year_uncollected = 0
 
 // Collection target calculation
 collection_target = total_sales * target_percentage
 
 // Adjust for previous year's uncollected
 final_collection_target = collection_target + previous_year_uncollected
 
 // Recycling target (usually 70% of collection)
 recycling_target = final_collection_target * 0.70
 
 OUTPUT: final_collection_target, recycling_target
END
examples.explanation: Calculates the mandatory collection and recycling targets that producers must achieve under EPR regulations.
